proposal_summary: Proposal to renew the OpenZeppelin Security Partnership for 2025, funding a payment streamer contract with approximately 100,000 COMP (110% of $4M USDC equivalent) from the Comptroller.

disclosed_entities.name: payment streamer contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal grants COMP from the Comptroller to the payment streamer contract

disclosed_entities.name: Comptroller
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal grants COMP from the Comptroller

disclosed_entities.name: COMP
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: USDC-price-adjusted COMP streaming mechanism... deposit of 110% of the 4M USDC equivalent in COMP, approximately 100,000 COMP

claimed_actions.raw_action: grants COMP from the Comptroller to the payment streamer contract
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Funds the streamer contract with approximately 100,000 COMP to cover the annual security partnership fee.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This proposal grants COMP from the Comptroller to the payment streamer contract

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Starts the streaming process of the COMP tokens over the course of a year.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal involves a straightforward token transfer from the treasury to an external streamer contract and a call to initialize the stream.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal grants COMP from the Comptroller to the payment streamer contract, created by the Streamer Factory... and initializes the stream.

limitations: Exact function names and signatures to execute the COMP grant and stream initialization are not detailed in the text.
The target address for the Comptroller is not provided, only the streamer contract address is given.
